ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spaces" (
  "space_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each space */,
  "space_key" TEXT /* Key of the space (used for identification) */,
  "space_name" TEXT /* Name of the space */,
  "space_type" TEXT /* Type of space (e.g., global, personal, favorite) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the space was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the space was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the space */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the space is archived */,
  "parent_space_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent space for hierarchical organization */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Default access level for the space */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("space_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., page, news, attachment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., +foo, -bar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the label is hidden from general search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "space_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the space where the content is stored */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the content */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the content was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the content was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the content */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the content has been viewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is locked for editing */,
  "lock_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who locked the content */,
  "lock_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was locked */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is archived */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is deleted */,
  "parent_content_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent content for hierarchical organization */,
  "last_editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who edited the content */,
  "last_edit_date" TEXT /* Date the content was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_parent_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_space_id FOREIGN KEY ("space_id") REFERENCES spaces ("space_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_last_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_labels" (
  "content_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-label association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_labels_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_labels_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_spaces" (
  "user_space_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-space association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "space_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user in the space (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the space is the default space for the user */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date the user last accessed the space */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_space_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_spaces_space_id FOREIGN KEY ("space_id") REFERENCES spaces ("space_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_spaces_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the content */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the content */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to view the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_views_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the content */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was downloaded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to download the content */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to download the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_downloads_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migrations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being migrated */,
  "migration_date" TEXT /* Date the migration was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the migration (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the migration */,
  "source_environment" TEXT /* Source environment of the migration */,
  "target_environment" TEXT /* Target environment of the migration */,
  "migration_type" TEXT /* Type of migration (e.g., full, incremental) */,
  "migration_size" INTEGER /* Size of the migration in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_parameters" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "spaces" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of spaces to search in */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Page hierarchy scope to restrict the search */,
  "labels" TEXT /* List of labels to filter the search */,
  "types" TEXT /* List of content types to include in the search */,
  "sort" TEXT /* List of columns to sort the results by */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* The actual search query text */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search in milliseconds */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search (e.g., quick, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_parameters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "search_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content found in the search */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the content in the search results */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the content in the search results */,
  "snippet" TEXT /* Snippet of the content to provide context in search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_search_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_id") REFERENCES search_parameters ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is deleted */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the rating was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., +foo, -bar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is hidden from general search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tag_associations" (
  "content_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-tag association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tag_associations_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES content_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tag_associations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
